title: Open-Source AI Agent Tools
summary: Published 88CN projects with public source links and AI agent or developer workflow relevance.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be manually selected from local reviewed 88CN records, have published status, and include at least one public source link.
whyIncluded: Aurora Code and VectorBase are published local records with public sources and builder-facing AI workflow relevance.
methodologyNote: Curated collections are finite editorial groups. They are selected from reviewed local project records and are not generated from tags, query parameters, external crawls, or bulk templates.

title: Commercial Readiness Signals
summary: Published 88CN projects with public product positioning, onboarding, or business-readiness context.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be manually selected from local reviewed 88CN records, have published status, and include public source links that support product-readiness review.
whyIncluded: Pulse Analytics and ComplyKit are published local records with public sources and clear product-readiness context.
methodologyNote: Commercial readiness here means public product context is reviewable. It does not verify revenue, customers, financing, or business outcomes.

title: Model and Search Infrastructure
summary: Published 88CN projects related to model workflows, semantic search, or AI infrastructure decisions.
inclusionCriteria: Projects must be manually selected from local reviewed 88CN records, have published status, and include public source links tied to infrastructure review.
whyIncluded: Nucleus ML and VectorBase are published local records with public sources and infrastructure-oriented product positioning.
methodologyNote: This collection is a reviewed discovery surface for related infrastructure projects. It does not recalculate scores or infer private adoption data.
